name: Delete DLFS File
description: Delete a file or empty directory from a DLFS drive. DLFS does not support recursive directory delete — the lattice's CRDT semantics keep tombstones for deleted children, so a logically-empty directory is still non-empty from the filesystem's perspective.
creator: Covia

path.description: File or directory path to delete

deleted.description: True if the target was deleted

existed.description: True if the target existed prior to the call
